name: silicon-docs
description: Silicon language documentation site (story 10c-10). VitePress static site that consolidates the in-repo docs/ into a user-facing reference.

scripts.build:playground: bun run --cwd ../playground build && rm -rf src/public/play && mkdir -p src/public/play && cp ../playground/dist/index.html src/public/play/index.html
scripts.build: bun run build:playground && vitepress build src
